project.name: Ambiguous Dashboard Request
project.purpose: Plan a customer-issue dashboard request before implementation so ambiguous execution is blocked until the first workflow and data boundary are explicit.

non_goals.title: Do not implement the dashboard before blocker intent questions are resolved.
Do not connect live customer systems, assign tickets, send notifications, or create downstream automation.

capabilities.title: Capture dashboard intent without starting implementation.
Block readiness while workflow and data-source questions remain open.

requirements.title: The plan must record the vague dashboard request as intent, assumptions, and blocker questions instead of implementation instructions.
The readiness gate must remain blocked while the first workflow and data boundary are unresolved.

decisions.title: Treat the current request as planning state, not executable implementation scope.
Use downstream prompts only after the plan is locked.

risks.title: A direct agent may implement a dashboard based on hidden assumptions.
risks.mitigation: Keep unresolved workflow and data-boundary questions as blocker open questions until the user answers.

risks.title: Customer data handling may be unsafe if the source and sensitivity boundary are guessed.
risks.mitigation: Block lock until the allowed data source and non-goals for live systems are explicit.

evaluations.title: Planning record review.
evaluations.method: Review docs/plan and .ni/contract.json to confirm the vague request is represented as planning state, not executable implementation scope.

evaluations.title: Blocked readiness check.
evaluations.method: Run ni status for the workspace and verify it reports BLOCKED with R009 blocker open-question issues.

open_questions.title: Which team and first workflow must the dashboard serve?
What data source and customer-data boundary may v0 use?
